Reviews Contact

Durable Floors for Minnesota Homes

Premium epoxy flooring solutions built to withstand Minneapolis winters. Transform your garage, basement, or commercial space with lasting protection.

Call Now: 555-epo-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Crafting Stronger Surfaces Since 2012

Founded during the polar vortex of 2012, Summit Epoxy Flooring was born from recognizing how Twin Cities winters destroy unprotected concrete. Our founder, a lifelong Minneapolis resident, developed proprietary cold-weather application techniques that set us apart.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned

Our Epoxy Flooring Services

Professional epoxy flooring solutions tailored to your needs.

Residential Garage Floors

Heavy-duty garage protection engineered for Minnesota's harsh winters.

Moisture-resistant basement floors that combat Minnesota's high water tables.

Commercial Epoxy Systems

High-traffic floors for Twin Cities businesses that demand durability.

Luxury floors that elevate Minneapolis lofts and high-end homes.

Learn More →

Concrete Repair & Resurfacing

Structural solutions for frost-damaged Twin Cities concrete.

Learn More →

Anti-Slip Floor Systems

Safety flooring for Minnesota's icy entryways and pool decks.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our epoxy flooring services.

How long before I can park on my new floor?

Our fast-cure formula allows light vehicle use in 24 hours - crucial during winter when garages store cars overnight.

Will epoxy prevent cracks in my old garage slab?

While it won't stop existing cracks from moving, our flexible epoxy bridges hairline fractures and contains crack-isolation membranes for problematic areas.

Reviews From Our Epoxy Flooring Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Our 1962 rambler's garage floor had massive salt damage from 40 Minnesota winters. Summit's team removed the spalled concrete and installed a quartz-filled epoxy that looks brand new after two brutal winters. The cove base has completely stopped meltwater from seeping into our basement walls."

Mark T. Residential Garage Floors

"I wanted something special for my North Loop loft's sunroom. The artisans created a swirling copper/iron design that changes with sunlight throughout the day. Even in January when it's -10°F outside, the floor stays warm with our radiant heat and shows zero cracks."

Anika R. Decorative Metallic Epoxy

"Our Plymouth driveway looked like a war zone after the 2023 ice storms. Summit's infrared scan found voids we didn't know existed. The polymer overlay matched our existing broom finish perfectly and their expansion joint placement has prevented new cracks despite temperature swings."

David & Susan L. Concrete Repair & Resurfacing
